param scope

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.datasource.Instances.attr_instance_names
documentation: Attribute InstanceNames: The list of instance names.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.datasource.Instances.attr_instances
documentation: Attribute Instances: The list of instances.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::OTS::Instances`, which is used to query Tablestore instances.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstances\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-ots-instances>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.datasource.InstancesProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instances`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-ots-instances>

```
param instance_name

Property instanceName: The name of instance.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.

param status

Property status: The status of instance.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.datasource.InstancesProps.instance_name
documentation: Property instanceName: The name of instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.datasource.InstancesProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.datasource.InstancesProps.status
documentation: Property status: The status of instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.datasource.RosInstances.status
documentation: :Property: status: The status of instance.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::OTS::Instances`, which is used to query Tablestore instances.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Instances` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-ots-instances>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.datasource.RosTables.table_name
documentation: :Property: tableName: The name of table.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::OTS::Tables`, which is used to query the names of all tables that are created in an instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Tables` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-ots-tables>

modules.name: ros_cdk_ots

classes.name: ros_cdk_ots.Instance

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.Instance.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.Instance.attr_instance_name
documentation: Attribute InstanceName: Instance name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.Instance.attr_private_endpoint
documentation: Attribute PrivateEndpoint: Private endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.Instance.attr_public_endpoint
documentation: Attribute PublicEndpoint: Public endpoint.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.Instance.attr_vpc_endpoint
documentation: Attribute VpcEndpoint: Vpc endpoint.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::OTS::Instance`, which is used to create a Tablestore instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ots-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.InstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ots-instance>

```
param instance_name

Property instanceName: The name of the instance.

param cluster_type

Property clusterType: Cluster type, the default is SSD. This parameter specifies the specification of the ots instance. When the value is SSD, the ots instance is a high-performance instance. When the value is Hybid, the ots instance is a capacity instance

param description

Property description: Instance description.

param network

Property network: Instance network type, default is NORMAL.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 5 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.InstanceProps.instance_name
documentation: Property instanceName: The name of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.InstanceProps.cluster_type
documentation:
Property clusterType: Cluster type, the default is SSD.

This parameter specifies the specification of the ots instance.
When the value is SSD, the ots instance is a high-performance instance.
When the value is Hybid, the ots instance is a capacity instance

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.InstanceProps.description
documentation: Property description: Instance description.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.InstanceProps.network
documentation: Property network: Instance network type, default is NORMAL.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.InstanceProps.tags
documentation:
Property tags: Tags to attach to instance.

Max support 5 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.attr_index_name
documentation: :Attribute: IndexName: Index name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.field_schemas
documentation: :Property: fieldSchemas: list of field_schema.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.index_name
documentation: :Property: indexName: The index name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.instance_name
documentation: :Property: instanceName: The name of the OTS instance in which table will locate.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.table_name
documentation: :Property: tableName: The table name of the OTS instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.index_setting
documentation: :Property: indexSetting: Index settings

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.index_sort
documentation:
:Property:

indexSort: This parameter specifies how data is sorted.
By default, the data is sorted in the same way as the primary key of the table.
If the search index contains NESTED fields, data is not sorted by default.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSchemasProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param analyzer: true
param enable_sort_and_agg: true
param field_name: true
param field_type: true
param index: true
param is_array: true
param store: true
param sub_field_schemas: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSchemasProperty.field_name
documentation:
:Property:

fieldName: This parameter specifies the name of the field (column) to index.
The field can be a primary key column or an attribute column.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSchemasProperty.field_type
documentation:
:Property:

fieldType: This parameter specifies the type of the field. Type: FieldType.
For more information, see the description of field types for a search index.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSchemasProperty.analyzer
documentation:
:Property:

analyzer: This parameter specifies the tokenizer.
You can specify this parameter if the column is a TEXT column. Type: AnalyzerType.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSchemasProperty.enable_sort_and_agg
documentation: :Property: enableSortAndAgg: This parameter specifies whether to enable sorting and aggregation for the column.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSchemasProperty.index
documentation:
:Property:

index: This parameter specifies whether to index the column.
The default is true, which means to build an inverted index or a spatial index for the column; if it is set to false, the column will not be indexed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSchemasProperty.is_array
documentation:
:Property:

isArray: This parameter specifies whether the column is an array.
A value of true indicates that the column is an array. Data written to the column must be a JSON array.
Example: ["a","b","c"]. You do not need to explicitly specify this parameter for NESTED columns because they are arrays.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSchemasProperty.store
documentation:
:Property:

store: This parameter specifies whether to store the values of the field in the search index.
A value of true indicates that you can read the values of the field directly from the search index without the need to query the table.
This configuration optimizes query performance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSchemasProperty.sub_field_schemas
documentation:
:Property:

subFieldSchemas: This parameter specifies the list of field schemas for subfields.
If the column is a NESTED column, you must specify this parameter to configure the index types of subcolumns in the NESTED column.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSortProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param field_name: true
param sort_mode: true
param sort_order: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSortProperty.field_name
documentation: :Property: fieldName: Sorted field name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSortProperty.sort_mode
documentation: :Property: sortMode: Sorting method when there are multiple values in the field.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.FieldSortProperty.sort_order
documentation: :Property: sortOrder: The sort order can be sorted in ascending or descending order, the default is ascending(SortOrder.ASC).

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.GeoDistanceSortProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param field_name: true
param points: true
param sort_mode: true
param sort_order: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.GeoDistanceSortProperty.field_name
documentation: :Property: fieldName: Sorted field name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.GeoDistanceSortProperty.points
documentation: :Property: points: The parameter of GeoDistanceSort

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.GeoDistanceSortProperty.sort_mode
documentation: :Property: sortMode: Sorting method when there are multiple values in the field.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.GeoDistanceSortProperty.sort_order
documentation: :Property: sortOrder: The sort order can be sorted in ascending or descending order

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.IndexSettingProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param routing_fields: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.IndexSettingProperty.routing_fields
documentation:
:Property:

routingFields: You can use this advanced feature to customize routing fields.
You can specify some primary key columns as routing fields.
Tablestore distributes data that is written to a search index to different partitions based on the specified routing fields.
The data with the same routing field values is distributed to the same data partition.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.IndexSortProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param sorters: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.IndexSortProperty.sorters
documentation:
:Property:

sorters: This parameter specifies the sorting methods.  Valid values:

- PrimaryKeySort: The index is sorted by primary key in ascending or descending order.
- FieldSort: The index is sorted by a specified column in ascending or descending order.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.PrimaryKeySortProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param sort_order: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.PrimaryKeySortProperty.sort_order
documentation: :Property: sortOrder: The sort order can be sorted in ascending or descending order, the default is ascending(SortOrder.ASC).

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.ScoreSortProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param sort_order: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.ScoreSortProperty.sort_order
documentation: :Property: sortOrder: The sort order can be sorted in ascending or descending order

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SortersProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param field_sort: true
param geo_distance_sort: true
param primary_key_sort: true
param score_sort: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SortersProperty.field_sort
documentation:
:Property:

fieldSort: Sort by field value.
Only fields that are indexed and have sorting and statistical aggregation functions enabled can be pre-sorted

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SortersProperty.geo_distance_sort
documentation: :Property: geoDistanceSort: You can use GeoDistanceSort to sort the query result based on distances of geographical locations.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SortersProperty.primary_key_sort
documentation: :Property: primaryKeySort: You can use PrimaryKeySort to sort the query result based on the order of primary key columns.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SortersProperty.score_sort
documentation:
:Property:

scoreSort: You can use ScoreSort to sort the query result by keyword relevance score.
ScoreSort is applicable to scenarios such as full-text indexing.
Note Note that you must set ScoreSort to sort the query result by keyword relevance score. Otherwise, the query result is sorted based on the value of the IndexSort field.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SubFieldSchemasProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param analyzer: true
param enable_sort_and_agg: true
param field_name: true
param field_type: true
param index: true
param is_array: true
param store: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SubFieldSchemasProperty.field_name
documentation:
:Property:

fieldName: This parameter specifies the name of the field (column) to index.
The field can be a primary key column or an attribute column.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SubFieldSchemasProperty.field_type
documentation:
:Property:

fieldType: This parameter specifies the type of the field. Type: FieldType.
For more information, see the description of field types for a search index.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SubFieldSchemasProperty.analyzer
documentation:
:Property:

analyzer: This parameter specifies the tokenizer.
You can specify this parameter if the column is a TEXT column. Type: AnalyzerType.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SubFieldSchemasProperty.enable_sort_and_agg
documentation: :Property: enableSortAndAgg: This parameter specifies whether to enable sorting and aggregation for the column.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SubFieldSchemasProperty.index
documentation:
:Property:

index: This parameter specifies whether to index the column.
The default is true, which means to build an inverted index or a spatial index for the column; if it is set to false, the column will not be indexed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SubFieldSchemasProperty.is_array
documentation:
:Property:

isArray: This parameter specifies whether the column is an array.
A value of true indicates that the column is an array. Data written to the column must be a JSON array.
Example: ["a","b","c"]. You do not need to explicitly specify this parameter for NESTED columns because they are arrays.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosSearchIndex.SubFieldSchemasProperty.store
documentation:
:Property:

store: This parameter specifies whether to store the values of the field in the search index.
A value of true indicates that you can read the values of the field directly from the search index without the need to query the table.
This configuration optimizes query performance.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::OTS::SearchIndex`, which is used to create a search index for a data table.

You can create multiple search indexes for a data table.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `SearchIndex` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ots-searchindex>

documentation:

param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable._render_properties
documentation:
---
param props: '-'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.attr_table_name
documentation: :Attribute: TableName: Table name

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.instance_name
documentation: :Property: instanceName: The name of the OTS instance in which table will locate.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.primary_key
documentation: :Property: primaryKey: It describes the attribute value of primary key. The number of primary_key should not be less than one and not be more than four.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.table_name
documentation: :Property: tableName: The table name of the OTS instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.columns
documentation: :Property: columns: Attribute column for table store.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.deviation_cell_version_in_sec
documentation: :Property: deviationCellVersionInSec: Maximum version deviation. The purpose is mainly to prohibit writing and expected large data, such as setting the deviation_cell_version_in_sec to 1000, and if the current timestamp is 10000, the timestamp range allowed to be written is [10000 - 1000, 10000 + 1000]. The valid value is 1-9223372036854775807. Defaults to 86400.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.max_versions
documentation: :Property: maxVersions: The maximum number of versions stored in this table. The valid value is 1-2147483647. Default to 1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.reserved_throughput
documentation: :Property: reservedThroughput: The initial reserved read/write throughput setting of the table to be created, the reserved read throughput and reserved write throughput of any table cannot exceed 5000.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.secondary_indices
documentation: :Property: secondaryIndices: The secondary indices of the table.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.time_to_live
documentation: :Property: timeToLive: The retention time of data stored in this table (unit: second). The value maximum is 2147483647 and -1 means never expired. Default to -1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.ColumnsProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param name: true
param type: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTable.ColumnsProperty.name
documentation: :Property: name: The column name of the column.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::OTS::Table`, which is used to create a table based on a specified schema.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Table` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ots-table>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTableProps.__init__

Properties for defining a `RosTable`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ots-table>

```
param instance_name



param primary_key



param table_name



param columns



param deviation_cell_version_in_sec



param max_versions



param reserved_throughput



param secondary_indices



param time_to_live

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTableProps.instance_name
documentation: :Property: instanceName: The name of the OTS instance in which table will locate.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTableProps.primary_key
documentation: :Property: primaryKey: It describes the attribute value of primary key. The number of primary_key should not be less than one and not be more than four.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTableProps.table_name
documentation: :Property: tableName: The table name of the OTS instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTableProps.columns
documentation: :Property: columns: Attribute column for table store.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTableProps.deviation_cell_version_in_sec
documentation: :Property: deviationCellVersionInSec: Maximum version deviation. The purpose is mainly to prohibit writing and expected large data, such as setting the deviation_cell_version_in_sec to 1000, and if the current timestamp is 10000, the timestamp range allowed to be written is [10000 - 1000, 10000 + 1000]. The valid value is 1-9223372036854775807. Defaults to 86400.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTableProps.max_versions
documentation: :Property: maxVersions: The maximum number of versions stored in this table. The valid value is 1-2147483647. Default to 1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTableProps.reserved_throughput
documentation: :Property: reservedThroughput: The initial reserved read/write throughput setting of the table to be created, the reserved read throughput and reserved write throughput of any table cannot exceed 5000.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTableProps.secondary_indices
documentation: :Property: secondaryIndices: The secondary indices of the table.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosTableProps.time_to_live
documentation: :Property: timeToLive: The retention time of data stored in this table (unit: second). The value maximum is 2147483647 and -1 means never expired. Default to -1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosVpcBinder.VpcsProperty.instance_vpc_name
documentation: :Property: instanceVpcName: Custom name, need to be unique under the OTS instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosVpcBinder.VpcsProperty.network
documentation:
:Property:

network: Instance network type. The values are as follows:
1, the NORMAL instance does not limit the source of the request. (Defaults)
2. A VPC instance only allows requests from all VPCs it is bound to.
3, VPC_CONSOLE instance only allows requests from the console and all VPCs it is bound to

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosVpcBinder.VpcsProperty.virtual_switch_id
documentation: :Property: virtualSwitchId: vSwitch Id.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.RosVpcBinder.VpcsProperty.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: Vpc Id.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::OTS::VpcBinder`, which is used to bind a Tablestore instance to a virtual private cloud (VPC).

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `VpcBinder` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ots-vpcbinder>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.SearchIndex.attr_index_name
documentation: Attribute IndexName: Index name.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::OTS::SearchIndex`, which is used to create a search index for a data table.

You can create multiple search indexes for a data table.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosSearchIndex\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ots-searchindex>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.SearchIndexProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `SearchIndex`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ots-searchindex>

```
param field_schemas

Property fieldSchemas: list of field_schema.

param index_name

Property indexName: The index name.

param instance_name

Property instanceName: The name of the OTS instance in which table will locate.

param table_name

Property tableName: The table name of the OTS instance.

param index_setting

Property indexSetting: Index settings.

param index_sort

Property indexSort: This parameter specifies how data is sorted. By default, the data is sorted in the same way as the primary key of the table. If the search index contains NESTED fields, data is not sorted by default.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.SearchIndexProps.field_schemas
documentation: Property fieldSchemas: list of field_schema.

documentation: Property indexSetting: Index settings.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.SearchIndexProps.index_sort
documentation:
Property indexSort: This parameter specifies how data is sorted.

By default, the data is sorted in the same way as the primary key of the table.
If the search index contains NESTED fields, data is not sorted by default.

documentation: Attribute TableName: Table name.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::OTS::Table`, which is used to create a table based on a specified schema.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosTable\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ots-table>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.TableProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Table`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ots-table>

```
param instance_name

Property instanceName: The name of the OTS instance in which table will locate.

param primary_key

Property primaryKey: It describes the attribute value of primary key. The number of primary_key should not be less than one and not be more than four.

param table_name

Property tableName: The table name of the OTS instance.

param columns

Property columns: Attribute column for table store.

param deviation_cell_version_in_sec

Property deviationCellVersionInSec: Maximum version deviation. The purpose is mainly to prohibit writing and expected large data, such as setting the deviation_cell_version_in_sec to 1000, and if the current timestamp is 10000, the timestamp range allowed to be written is [10000 - 1000, 10000 + 1000]. The valid value is 1-9223372036854775807. Defaults to 86400.

param max_versions

Property maxVersions: The maximum number of versions stored in this table. The valid value is 1-2147483647. Default to 1.

param reserved_throughput

Property reservedThroughput: The initial reserved read/write throughput setting of the table to be created, the reserved read throughput and reserved write throughput of any table cannot exceed 5000.

param secondary_indices

Property secondaryIndices: The secondary indices of the table.

param time_to_live

Property timeToLive: The retention time of data stored in this table (unit: second). The value maximum is 2147483647 and -1 means never expired. Default to -1.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.TableProps.instance_name
documentation: Property instanceName: The name of the OTS instance in which table will locate.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.TableProps.primary_key
documentation:

The number of primary_key should not be less than one and not be more than four.

The purpose is mainly to prohibit writing and expected large data, such as setting the deviation_cell_version_in_sec to 1000, and if the current timestamp is 10000, the timestamp range allowed to be written is [10000 - 1000, 10000 + 1000]. The valid value is 1-9223372036854775807. Defaults to 86400.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.TableProps.max_versions
documentation:
Property maxVersions: The maximum number of versions stored in this table.

The valid value is 1-2147483647. Default to 1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.TableProps.reserved_throughput
documentation: Property reservedThroughput: The initial reserved read/write throughput setting of the table to be created, the reserved read throughput and reserved write throughput of any table cannot exceed 5000.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ots.TableProps.secondary_indices
documentation: Property secondaryIndices: The secondary indices of the table.

The value maximum is 2147483647 and -1 means never expired. Default to -1.
